title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Thomas Cook India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Thomas Cook India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Thomas Cook India in Allahabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Thomas Cook India:
Thomas Cook India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Thomas Cook India!
